danger_signals.meaning: Damage taken upon touching enemies or their projectiles
Damage taken from certain obstacles in level environment

danger_signals.visual_form: Spot face icon that gradually bends forward
danger_signals.meaning: Cumulative damage indicator; face eventually falls from position indicating near-death
Failure condition if timer reaches zero before level completion

safety_signals.visual_form: 7 Up logo pickup (NA version) or white V on red circle (EU version) or TOP logo (JP version)
1-Up item displaying 7 Up logo variant (design differs by region)

safety_signals.meaning: Safe restart point; allows respawn at checkpoint on death

safety_signals.visual_form: Caged Spot characters (identical-looking to player character)
safety_signals.meaning: Safe state to unlock once collection quota met; frees rescued spots

faction_indicators.color_identity: Red circle with white/red design (NA/JP variants)
faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: 7 Up logo (NA); TOP triangle logo (JP); Virgin Games V in red circle (EU)
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Logo appears on health pickups, 1-Up items, intro sequence bottle; Spot character itself is brand mascot with red spot marking

faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Enemies throw projectiles that damage player
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Positioned throughout levels as obstacles to overcome

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Intro sequence shows Spot surfing on 7 Up bottle (NA: jumps off logo onto bottle; EU/JP: already on bottle); branded aesthetic establishes 7 Up world
Platforming environment with scattered collectible 'spots' throughout level; caged Spot characters at strategic locations
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Player must navigate hazards, collect quota of spots, defeat/avoid enemies, reach objective before time expires

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Rescued Spot characters freed from cages upon collection quota met
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Progression to next level or bonus stage unlocked

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Bonus stage with different background (visual variants by region); hidden continue letters spelling 'UNCOLA' dispersed throughout
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Player can collect letters to gain continues; restarts from last level on death with point reset

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Spot face health indicator bent forward at extreme angle
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: One additional hit will cause game over; player vulnerability state

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Spot face health indicator falls from position
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Life lost; restart from checkpoint or lose continue

environmental_storytelling.example: Entire game world themed around 7 Up brand; levels contain branded pickups, intro features branded bottle, rescue mission contextualizes collecting 'spots' as part of brand narrative

environmental_storytelling.technique: Regional visual adaptation for narrative consistency
environmental_storytelling.example: EU version replaces 7 Up logo with S.O.S. bottle and Virgin Games V-branding to reflect Fido Dido as local mascot; JP version substitutes TOP brand triangle; maintains gameplay while respecting regional licensing context
Spot's distinctive red spot marking and consistent character design across all collectibles and UI elements; reinforces brand identity and player character recognition
Scattered 'spots' throughout levels suggest rescue mission context; caged identical Spot characters waiting to be freed creates narrative purpose for collection mechanics
Spot face health indicator shows emotional/physical degradation (bending forward) providing visual narrative of damage accumulation and approaching defeat

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Can jump in all directions; can attack by throwing soda bubbles in any direction; can cling to and climb by jumping in front of climbable surfaces
Takes damage from enemy contact, enemy projectiles, and certain obstacles; health face indicator bends forward with each hit
Must gather specified quota of 'spots' (quota increases as game progresses) to unlock caged Spot characters for rescue
Throw projectiles at player; can be avoided or potentially attacked with soda bubbles (attack mechanic not fully detailed in sources)
Remain stationary in cages until collection quota is met; then freed, indicating level objective completion
Countdown forces player to complete level before expiration; failure condition if timer reaches zero

notes: Cool Spot is a branded platformer with limited traditional world-state complexity. Primary visual communication focuses on brand identity integration (7 Up/regional variants), health status feedback through character UI, and objective-driven level design. No faction conflicts or political situations present; world-state changes primarily driven by level progression and health mechanics. Regional adaptations demonstrate how visual manifestation adjusts to maintain brand consistency while respecting local licensing and market conditions. Danger/safety signals rely heavily on branded collectible items and enemy/obstacle avoidance patterns typical of platformer genre.
sources_used: tcrf (The Cutting Room Floor - Cool Spot SNES)
